provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, thick paint texture, slightly textured brushwork not smooth CG, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human female dockside cargo loader in her 20s with strong shoulders and hands callused from grav-clamp handles, wearing a high-visibility orange safety hardshell over a dirty charcoal thermal undersuit, heavy reinforced vacuum-rated work gloves clipped to a belt ring, steel-toe mag-lock boots caked with cargo dust and docking bay grime, a half-face respirator hanging around her neck for atmo-breach protocols, safety goggles pushed up on her forehead, the hardshell vest is scuffed and the hazard strips are peeling from UV exposure under station floods, she loads freight in partial vacuum for a living
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, modern earth clothes, contemporary fashion, jeans, sneakers, t-shirt logo, brand name, medieval, fantasy armor, superhero

judgment.explanation: Orange hazmat suit with respirator and goggles, in a ship airlock area. Heavy duty industrial space worker. The orange pops against the dark metal background — functional hi-vis in a dangerous environment.
